title: Orey Bujjigaa
overview: Bujji and Krishnaveni run away on the same day to avoid getting married, leaving their village to believe that they have eloped. The two soon fall in love, unaware of their mutual circumstances.

trailers.title: Orey Bujjiga Trailer | 4K | Raj Tarun, Malvika Nair, Hebah Patel | World Premiere on AHA From Oct 2
